source: HQIV paper series (Zenodo records) + Lean witnesses. These are the HQIV framework predictions claimed in the papers, to be reproduced by the calculator (py mirror of Lean). Not experimental.

alpha.source: alpha=3/5 forced by lattice, papers + AlphaGammaForcedByLattice.lean

omega_k_true_paper.source: main paper / lightcone Omega_k^true at horizon

derived_proton_MeV.source: Lean DerivedNucleonMass + tuft witness (paper comparison to PDG)
